title: Loop Health
description: dev-loop pipeline health: success rate, lead time, gate failures

panels.title: Issues Processed Per Day
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, COUNT(DISTINCT trace_id) as total FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'tb%.run' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Daily Success Rate (%)
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN (gates_first_failure IS NULL OR gates_first_failure = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) as success_pct FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'gates.run_all' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Average Lead Time Per Day (seconds)
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, ROUND(AVG(CAST(duration AS DOUBLE) / 1000000), 1) as avg_lead_time_s FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'tb%.run' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Gate Failure Breakdown
panels.query: SELECT gates_first_failure as gate, COUNT(*) as failures FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'gates.run_all' AND (gates_first_failure IS NOT NULL AND gates_first_failure != '') AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY gate ORDER BY failures DESC

panels.title: Pipeline Runs Over Time
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as hour, COUNT(*) as runs FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name LIKE 'tb%.run' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

panels.title: Daily Retry Rate (%)
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN operation_name = 'feedback.retry' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN operation_name LIKE 'tb%.run' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1) as retry_pct FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
